---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report a typo, omission, or request new documentation for Red Bank
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: 'documentation'
assignees: ''
---

## 📚 Documentation Issue Description
A clear and concise description of the documentation issue. (e.g., Typo, broken link, missing API definition, outdated architectural diagram).

## 📄 File(s) Affected
List the exact Markdown files, API Docs, or comments that need updating:
- `docs/03_SystemArchitecture.md`
- `README.md`
- `backend/src/main/java/.../AuthService.java`

## 📉 Current Text / Behavior
What does the documentation currently say?

## 📈 Proposed Correction
What should the documentation say instead?

## 📸 Screenshots
If a diagram or UI screenshot in the docs is outdated, paste it here.

## ⚡ Priority
- [ ] Low (Typo, grammatical error)
- [ ] Medium (Unclear instructions, missing context)
- [ ] High (Incorrect architecture/API payload, broken deployment instructions)

## ✅ Pre-flight Checklist
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this documentation issue hasn't been reported.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context here.
